reviews.comment:
Buena estación de servicio para repostar combustible. Lo encontré excesivamente caro. Me contaron que el combustible sube todos los días y ya superó el precio del combustible en bariloche y en san martín de los andes. Una avivada. Me gustó mucho la atención del personal el cuál se mostró muy amable y cordial. Todo muy limpio y ordenado. Aceptan todo tipo de pago. La tienda serviclub es amplia y tiene una buena variedad de platos tipo minutas, buena cafetería y baños limpios. Los precios son acordes al lugar y tiene promociones tentadoras.

(Translated by Google)
Good gas station for refueling. I found it excessively expensive. I was told that fuel prices go up every day and have already surpassed those in Bariloche and San Martín de los Andes. A rip-off. I really liked the service from the staff, who were very friendly and courteous. Everything was very clean and organized. They accept all types of payment. The convenience store is spacious and has a good variety of quick meals, a good coffee shop, and clean restrooms. The prices are reasonable for the location, and they have tempting promotions.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/9139643363290501136/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNtXzlHbzlnRRAB

reviews.comment:
MALA ATENCION DE  PLAYEROS NUNCA PREGUNTARON SI ERA SOCIO ESTACIONAMIENTO SOLO ES PAGO X MES!! LA VERDAD  TODO MAL Y ENOJADO SIENDO SOCIO  MALLLLLLLL ACA DE ESQUEL!!!

(Translated by Google)
Terrible service from the beach attendants! They never asked if I was a member. Parking is only paid monthly! Honestly, everything was bad and I'm angry as a member. This is a terrible experience here in Esquel!
